meaning: n.岩石,暗礁,石头,摇动vt.摇摆,使动摇vi.摇,摇动
examples: A rock is an inanimate object.
The ship hit an uncharted rock.
The keel hit the rock first.
An ancient drawing of a gladiator has been carved into the rock, probably with a nail.
Even before your ferry arrives on the Rock, you will start plotting your getaway.
